violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Shell egg in cardboard flat were stored on top of prepped veggies in cold-hold prep table. -Shelled eggs stored in cardboard flats out of the box next to a box of individual butter packets in coca-cola reach in cooler on bottom shelf.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -When tested at the time of inspection the sanitation bucket was under acceptable range. The cloth was correctly stored inside solution.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -A straining was found sitting in the handwash sink at time of inspection.
